coverage_note: The bundled APC population database stores gene-level and marker-level interpretation notes, but does not embed a full ancestry-frequency matrix for these markers yet.
gene_population_patterns_intro: Broader population patterns curated from APC Wnt/beta-catenin restraint, cell adhesion, chromosome segregation, intestinal stem-cell control, and colorectal tumor biology and condition-association literature.

sources.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000134982: APC coordinate source

gene_population_patterns.summary: APC findings should be read against Wnt/beta-catenin restraint, cell adhesion, chromosome segregation, intestinal stem-cell control, and colorectal tumor biology; population frequency, ascertainment, and phenotype definition can change the apparent effect size.

APC truncating-variant model is curated as a APC marker for Familial adenomatous polyposis review context, Colorectal tumor-suppressor biology; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.

APC I1307K model is curated as a APC marker for Familial adenomatous polyposis review context, Colorectal tumor-suppressor biology; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.
